eval_dimensions.name: Subcommand Routing
eval_dimensions.description: Correctly parses arguments to determine subcommand (list, view, edit, reset) and routes to the appropriate workflow

eval_dimensions.name: Skill Discovery
eval_dimensions.description: Scans skill directories for references/playbook.yaml to find all playbook-powered skills automatically

eval_dimensions.name: Play Resolution
eval_dimensions.description: Resolves plays using the correct order: user overrides (persist: false first, then persist: true), then defaults from the skill's playbook.yaml

eval_dimensions.name: Guided Editing Flow
eval_dimensions.description: Uses AskUserQuestion decision gates for all edit operations (add/remove/reorder/edit step), previews changes before saving, and supports continue-editing loop

eval_dimensions.name: Playbook File Management
eval_dimensions.description: Creates per-skill override files only on first save, preserves existing overrides, correctly formats YAML with persist flag and date

eval_dimensions.name: Decision Gates
eval_dimensions.description: All blocking choices use AskUserQuestion tool calls, not plain text questions

eval_dimensions.name: Fragment Resolution
eval_dimensions.description: Fragment references are correctly expanded inline, with condition overrides propagated, circular references detected, and missing fragments producing clear errors

evals.name: List playbook-powered skills
evals.description: User invokes /Dev10x:playbook with no arguments, expects summary table of all playbook-powered skills

assertions.signal: Lists the work-on skill as playbook-powered
Shows play names for discovered skills

evals.name: View plays for a specific skill
evals.description: User invokes /Dev10x:playbook view work-on, expects list of all plays

evals.name: View a specific play with fragment markers
evals.description: User invokes /Dev10x:playbook view work-on feature, expects play tree with [FRAGMENT] markers for fragment references

assertions.signal: Shows the first step of the feature play
Reads the playbook file to get play defaults
Shows [FRAGMENT: name] marker for fragment references in the play

evals.name: Edit subcommand uses AskUserQuestion
evals.description: Edit flow must use AskUserQuestion for operation selection

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called for edit operation selection
AskUserQuestion is called for save/continue/discard decision

evals.name: Reset subcommand confirms before deleting
evals.description: Reset must confirm with user before removing overrides

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called before resetting overrides

evals.name: Per-skill file isolation
evals.description: Overrides are stored in per-skill files, not a shared file

assertions.signal: Writes to per-skill override file, not a shared file

evals.name: Fragment references resolve correctly
evals.description: When resolving a play for execution, fragment references are expanded into their constituent steps

assertions.signal: Fragment steps are expanded inline when requested
Expanded view shows all steps from the shipping-pipeline fragment

evals.name: Missing fragment produces clear error
evals.description: Pre-condition: the feature play references a nonexistent fragment name. Expects a clear error rather than silent skip.

assertions.signal: Shows an error message for missing fragment references

evals.name: Fragment condition override propagates
evals.description: When a fragment reference carries a condition, it is applied to all expanded steps

assertions.signal: Condition from fragment reference is applied to expanded steps

evals.name: Circular fragment reference is detected
evals.description: Pre-condition: fragment A references fragment B which references fragment A. Resolution stops at depth 3 and shows a clear error.

assertions.signal: Shows a circular reference error message
